scripts.install: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
scripts.client_dev: cd client && npm run serve && cd ..
scripts.client_build: cd server && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.client_lint: cd client && npm run lint && cd ..
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.start: cd server && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run start && cd ..
